titleStmt.title: SII 24.77: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 77. (A.R. No. 121 of 1938-39.) III PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers gift of land after purchase by Ādittaṉ-Tiruvaraṅgadēvaṉ alias Virudarāja-bhayaṅkara Vijayapālaṉ for rearing a flower garden. The record is dated in the 31st year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻn=ta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻn=ta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavun=tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattuc cakkara koṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyīṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayirmuṉaik kon=taḷava raicar tan=taḷamiriya
vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḷvali [kāṭṭi porppari naṭātti kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭa ticai vākai cūṭit ten=ticait temaru] kamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum poṉṉi yāṭaiyum nannilappāvaiyun tanimaiyun=tavira puṉitaṟṟiru (punitaṟṟiru) maṇimaku ṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭit tannaṭi Iraṇṭun taṭa muṭiyākat tonnila ven=tar cūṭa muṉṉai manu
vāṟu peruka[k kaliyāṟu vaṟuppa ceṅkol ticai toṟum cella veṇkuṭai Irunila viḷākam Eṅkaṇun=tanātu tiruniḻal veṇṇilā tikaḻa Orutaṉi meruvil puliviḷaiyāṭa yāḻ kaṭaṟṟivāntarattu pūpālar tiṟai viṭutan=ta kalañcoṟika ḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavaṉ (navaṉ) karun=talai paruntalaittiṭa taṉ ponnakar puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa yinnāḷ kulappi
ṟaipol nilppiḻai yennuñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu tankai villetir koṭā vikkalan ciṅkaṇa ṉaṅkivi tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvena tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavu veṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷirum viṭṭa tanmānamum kūṟina vīramum kiṭappa Eṟiṉa malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta natikaḷum cuḻaṟṟuṭaintoṭa viḻun=ta kaṭalkaḷum talaivirittalamara kuṭaticait tannā
ṭukantu tānun=tātaiyum pannāḷiṭṭap palapala mutukum payantetir māṟiya jayap peru n=tiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻitaḷ celviyum vāḷaravoṇkaṇ maṭa ntayariṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkariniraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇameṉṉum pāṇi Iraṇṭum Oruvicaik kaikkoṇṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭi maṇṭalaṅ koḷḷat tiru
vuḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittalaṅkaḷum porukarittaraṅkamum tan=tiravāriyumuṭait tāy vantu vaṭakaṭal ten kaṭal pāyvatu pola tan peruñ ceṉai Evip pañca varaivarum poruta porkkaḷattañci veruneḷittoṭi Araṇenappukka kāṭaṟat tuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vanacara
rtiriyum poccai veñcurameṟṟi koṟṟa vijaiyastampa n=ticai toṟu niṟutti muttin calāpamum muttamiṭpotiyalum mattaveṅkari paṭumaiyyaccaiyyamum kan niyuṅ kaik koṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellaik kāṭṭik kuṭamalai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟel lān tani vicumpeṟa māveṟiya tanvarutanit talaivarai kuṟukalarku
(ku)laiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟitoṟu nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷit tiralkoḷ vīrasiṅhāsanam tiriyaviṭṭaruḷi poṅkoḷiyāramu n=tiruppuyattalaṅkaḷum pola viramun=tiyāka mum viḷaṅkap pārtoḻac civaniṭattu[ maiyana tina] cintāmaṇi Avaṉimuḻutuṭai yāḷiruppa Avan muṭi kaṅkai viṟṟirunta maṅkayar tilakam Eḻicai vallapi
Eḻulaku muṭaiyāḷ malarntinitiruppa Ūḻiyum Avani muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirājakecaripanmarāna tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī kolottuṅkacoḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 1 Āvatu tiruvaraṅkattāḻvār śrī kāriyañ ceykiṟa Ālat tūruṭaiyār Evalppaṭi . śrīva
yiṣṇavavāriyam nālūrttirunāṭuṭaiyānampiyum perumpuliyūr tiruvāykkula muṭaiyānampiyum Ālaṅkuṭit tiruvāyppāṭi dāsarum varakūr ciyvaiyiṣṇavadāsa rum Iṭavait tiruvaraṅkamāḷi Amutinārum ciypaṇṭāravāriyam Āritanum Ārā vamutu puṇṭarikanum cirāmava yakārimāṟaṉum pāratāyan cirāmantu
kaṉum kāviṭṭa naraciṅkan tiruviruṅka nārāyaṇanum Āritan kecavan taniyiḷañciṅkamum kauci(ṅ)kan ciṅkayan cempoṟ cotiyum Āḻvār koyil sevai kkāṟ nuṟṟuvappiriyanu ciyivayiṣṇavak kaṇakku ciy vayiṣṇavap piriyanum Āḻvār kanmika ṟuṅkuṭikku
Ātittan tiruvaraṅka tevanārāṉa virutarāja payaṅkara vijeyapālaṟku ttukku kuṭutta nilamāvatu Āḻvār tirumaṭaippaḷḷippuṟamāṉa rājamayen=tira ppāl nilattil nūṟu samvaṟsarattiṟ Uṟdeśamāka viri liṭāppayiṟ ceyya Uṇṇāte kiṭanta nila
ttil Ivaṟku Aṭuttuk kuṭutta nilam kiḻpāṟkellai kula ttu tiruttiṉa nilattukku meṟku ten pāṟkellai jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa vāyk kālukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai ma ḻakkaḷiṟu viḷākattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kellai jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa viḷākattukku viḷā
kattukkum teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta nāṉ kellaikku muḷpaṭṭa nilam veli nilam velikkum nilavilaiyāka śrī paṇṭārattu Oṭukkiṉa kācu 1 Ikkācu Onṟum Oṭukkuvittuk koṇṭa virutarāja payaṅkara vijeyapālarkku Aṭuttuk
nilam veliyum tiruttikkoṇṭu cey cai velikkum śrī paṇṭāra paḷḷi koṇṭān marakkālāl Aḷakku ḷa Aḷannnal Eṇ kalam śrī paṇṭārattukku Aḷakkak kaṭavarākavum tiruvaraṅka m Ep perp paṭṭa kuṭimaiyum ceyyakkaṭa vākki I Ivar cevikki
tirunan=tavanam ceykiṟa śrī vayiṣṇava muṇṭāna dāsan Uḷ ḷiṭṭā varkku Āḷonṟukku kāṇiyāka nālvarkku Āḷonṟukku kācu 1 Ākak kācu 1 m Ivvi koṇṭu It dāsanum vaṟkku
ceyyakkaṭavarkaḷākavum rājama koḷḷappeṟuvarākavum yt(ta)tu Ivvirutarājapayaṅkara vijeyapālarkku Aṭuttuk kuṭuttom Āḻvār kanmikaḷom Ippaṭikku Ivai Ālattūruṭaiyān Eḻuttu nālūrt tirunāṭuṭaiya nampi Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai perumpuliyūr tiruvāykku tti śrī vayiṣṇava Ivai tiruvaraṅkamāṇi Amutaneḻuttu śrī paṇṭāravāriyam Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarīkan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Āritan Irākavan śrīkāri māṟan Eḻuttu Ip
paṭikku yal cirāman tu yaṅkaṉeḻuttu Eḻuttu k kāśyapan ciṅkan tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku koyiṟ ciṅkan cempoṟ coti Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Āḻvār koyil sabhaik kaṇakku nānūṟṟuvappiriyaṉum Ippaṭikku Ivai śrīvayiṣṇavak kaṇakku śrī vayiṣṇava
ppiriyan Eḻuttu Itu śrī vayiṣṇava rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 24.77 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
